gold.rationale: 绵竹发生3.4级地震这一背景可能有事实基础，但文本把小震的影响描述成“多处受损、停课、多人受伤、道路封控、较高等级响应”等较重灾情，缺乏对应的权威通报支撑；同时关键“现场图”存在裁切叠字等编辑并疑似挪用他地/他次地震素材，导致图片无法语义上支持文中结论、且与文本形成证据关系不匹配，整体主导印象偏向夸大与误导，因此判定为 Mostly False。

atomic_points.post_summary: 四川德阳市绵竹市于 3 月 20 日前后发生 3.4 级地震，引发房屋开裂、学校停课、交通管控及医疗救治等影响。

sentence_level.sentence_text: 【快讯】据多方消息，3 月 20 日前后，四川德阳市绵竹市发生 3.4 级地震，部分区域震感较为明显。
atoms: Post claims a 3.4 magnitude earthquake occurred in Mianzhu City, Deyang City, Sichuan Province.
Post states the earthquake happened around March 20.
Post claims the earthquake caused noticeable shaking in some areas.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 受此次地震影响，绵竹部分老旧小区出现房屋墙体开裂情况，个别路段实施临时管控；
atoms: Post claims some old residential communities in Mianzhu experienced cracked building walls due to the earthquake.
Post states some road sections were temporarily controlled.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 部分学校启动停课及疏散安排；
atoms: Post claims some schools initiated suspension of classes and evacuation arrangements.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 医院接诊震后受伤市民，城市运行一度受到阶段性影响。
atoms: Post claims hospitals treated citizens injured after the earthquake.
Post states urban operations were temporarily affected.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 记者了解到，地震发生后，当地应急部门随即组织力量赶赴现场，启动较高等级应急处置机制，对居民区、沿街商铺以及地质灾害点开展连夜排查。
atoms: Post states local emergency departments organized forces to reach the scene after the earthquake.
Post claims a higher-level emergency response mechanism was activated.
Post mentions night-time inspections were conducted in residential areas, shops, and geological hazard points.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 多名社区工作人员向记者表示，针对疑似受损楼栋，已拉设警戒线并安排人员值守；
atoms: Post attributes a statement to multiple community workers.
Post claims warning lines were set up for suspected damaged buildings.
Post states personnel were assigned to guard these areas.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 相关网格员逐户上门登记情况，同时提醒居民暂时避开可能存在风险的点位。
atoms: Post claims grid members visited households to register situations.
Post states residents were advised to temporarily avoid potentially risky locations.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 医疗救治方面，绵竹多家医院急诊科消息显示，震后陆续有市民前来就诊，伤情以擦伤、扭伤、坠物砸伤为主，其中一部分为紧急撤离时摔倒所致。
atoms: Post claims multiple hospitals in Mianzhu received patients after the earthquake.
Post states injuries were mainly abrasions, sprains, and injuries from falling objects.
Post mentions some injuries occurred during emergency evacuation.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 知情人士透露，截至当晚已有十余名伤者被送医处理，个别需留观。
atoms: Post claims an insider revealed that over ten injured people were sent to hospitals by the end of the night.
Post states some patients required observation.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 医院对急诊通道实施临时分流，并增派值班力量应对就诊需求。
atoms: Post claims hospitals temporarily diverted emergency channels.
Post states extra staff were dispatched to handle patient demand.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 教育系统方面，现场多位家长反映，震感出现后，学校第一时间组织学生就地避险，并疏散到操场等空旷区域；
atoms: Post attributes a report to multiple parents on-site.
Post claims schools immediately organized students to take shelter after the shaking started.
Post states students were evacuated to open areas like playgrounds.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 数百名学生在老师带领下分批集合点名。
atoms: Post claims hundreds of students gathered and were called out by teachers.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 当地教育系统人士称，部分校点已临时调整课程安排，个别学校采取短时停课措施，待校舍安全复核完成后再恢复教学。
atoms: Post attributes a statement to a local education system official.
Post claims some schools temporarily adjusted class schedules.
Post states some schools took short-term suspension measures.
Post claims teaching would resume after building safety verification.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 交通出行方面，当地出行平台及多位司机反馈，城区部分道路出现临时封闭与绕行提示，个别老旧街区路面有轻微隆起，散落物对通行造成影响。
atoms: Post attributes feedback to local travel platforms and multiple drivers.
Post claims some urban roads were temporarily closed with detour warnings.
Post states some old street areas had slight surface bulging.
Post mentions scattered objects affected traffic.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 公交车、网约车在部分路段实施绕行，交警在重点路口加派警力疏导。
atoms: Post claims buses and ride-hailing vehicles detoured on some sections.
Post states traffic police added personnel at key intersections.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 现场人士称，靠近山体的道路还出现小范围落石清理作业，相关路段一度排队缓行。
atoms: Post attributes a statement to an on-site person.
Post claims small-scale rockfall cleanup occurred on roads near mountains.
Post states some road sections experienced queuing and slow movement.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 【现场】在绵竹城区多个小区，居民陆续下楼避险。
atoms: Post states residents in multiple communities in Mianzhu urban area went downstairs to avoid danger.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 多名市民告诉记者，地震来得突然，起初桌椅轻微晃动，随后能听到窗框作响；
atoms: Post attributes a report to multiple citizens.
Post claims the earthquake arrived suddenly.
Post states tables and chairs swayed slightly at first.
Post mentions window frames made noise afterwards.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 也有人在手机收到预警提示后，立即冲到楼道。
atoms: Post claims some people immediately ran to the hallway after receiving a warning on their phones.

sentence_level.sentence_text: “楼道里一下子挤满了人，大家都不敢坐电梯，只能跑楼梯。”一位居住在老旧小区的住户说，家里客厅墙角出现细裂纹，楼下单元门口可见碎玻璃和掉落的墙皮。
atoms: Post quotes a resident of an old community: 'The hallway suddenly filled with people, everyone dared not take the elevator, could only run up the stairs.'
Post claims fine cracks appeared in the living room corner of the resident's home.
Post states broken glass and falling wall plaster were visible at the entrance of the unit downstairs.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 另有商户称，部分店铺货架倾倒、玻璃制品破损，清理时“满地碎渣”。
atoms: Post attributes a statement to a merchant.
Post claims some shop shelves collapsed and glass items were broken.
Post quotes the merchant: 'Broken glass everywhere when cleaning.'
Post states the ground was covered in broken fragments during cleanup.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 社交平台上也出现多段“现场画面”流传，画面中可见救援人员转运物资、路面散落碎石以及疑似墙体裂缝的近景。
atoms: Post claims multiple 'on-site scenes' circulated on social media.
Post states rescue personnel transporting supplies were visible in the scenes.
Post mentions scattered stones on the road were visible.
Post claims close-ups of suspected wall cracks were visible.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 发布者称系“绵竹震中附近网友拍摄”。
atoms: Post claims the publisher stated the footage was shot by netizens near the Mianzhu epicenter.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 记者从多位转发者处了解到，部分图片带有红底白字角标“绵竹 3.4 级地震”“现场直击”及时间戳样式，裂缝部位对比度较高、细节锐化明显，并将不同场景的两张图拼接成“灾后合集图”。
atoms: Post claims the reporter learned from multiple forwarders.
Post states some images had red background white text corner labels reading 'Mianzhu 3.4 magnitude earthquake' and 'On-site direct hit' with timestamp styles.
Post claims the crack areas had high contrast and sharp details.
Post states two images of different scenes were spliced into a 'Post-disaster compilation image'.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 【应对提示】地震发生后，媒体账号同步推出“遇到地震如何应对”提醒。
atoms: Post states media accounts launched a 'How to deal with earthquakes' reminder after the earthquake.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 北京商报在相关科普帖（post_id：5278603963271681）中提示，室内应就近避险，优先躲在坚固家具旁、承重墙角或内墙角，远离玻璃窗、吊灯等悬挂物；
atoms: Post cites Beijing Business Daily in a science popularization post (post_id: 5278603963271681).
Post advises staying close to shelter indoors.
Post recommends hiding next to sturdy furniture, load-bearing wall corners, or inner wall corners.
Post advises staying away from glass windows, chandeliers, and other hanging objects.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 待震动停止后再有序撤离至空旷处，并警惕余震；
atoms: Post advises orderly evacuation to open areas after shaking stops.
Post advises being alert to aftershocks.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 撤离过程中不要乘坐电梯，避免拥挤踩踏；
atoms: Post advises not taking elevators during evacuation.
Post advises avoiding crowd crushing.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 户外应远离广告牌、树木和临时搭建物，同时持续关注权威渠道发布的预警与安全提示。
atoms: Post advises staying away from billboards, trees, and temporary structures outdoors.
Post advises continuously paying attention to warnings and safety tips from authoritative channels.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 目前，绵竹多处社区仍在统计受损情况，部分楼栋和道路维持临时管控。
atoms: Post states multiple communities in Mianzhu are still counting damage.
Post claims some buildings and roads remain under temporary control.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 伤者救治、校舍复核、隐患排查等工作仍在进行。
atoms: Post states injured person treatment is ongoing.
Post states school building verification is ongoing.
Post states hazard point inspections are ongoing.

sentence_level.sentence_text: 相关后续情况，记者将持续跟进；以上信息仍在核实中，并将持续更新。
atoms: Post states the reporter will continue to follow up on subsequent situations.
Post states the above information is still being verified.
Post states the information will be continuously updated.

paragraph_level: The earthquake in Mianzhu caused physical damage to buildings, roads, and shops, necessitating temporary controls and evacuations.
Emergency response involved immediate deployment of forces, night-time inspections, and setting up warning lines for damaged areas.
Medical facilities handled injuries primarily from falls, sprains, and falling objects, with over ten patients treated by nightfall.
Schools implemented immediate student sheltering and evacuation, with some schools suspending classes temporarily until safety verification.
Traffic disruptions included road closures, detours, and police presence due to surface damage and rockfalls near mountains.
Residents reported sudden shaking, window noises, and crowded hallways, with visible cracks and debris in their homes.
Social media circulated images of the disaster, some featuring red corner labels and spliced scenes, attributed to netizens near the epicenter.
Media outlets provided safety guidelines advising indoor sheltering near sturdy objects, avoiding elevators, and staying away from outdoor hazards.
Damage assessment and safety verification efforts are ongoing in Mianzhu, with the reporter promising further updates.

retrieved_evidence.text: 【#四川绵竹3.4级地震#】遇到地震，如何应对？ ​​​
四川德阳绵竹近日发生3.4级地震后，多处小区居民在夜间被迫聚集到室外，救援车辆和担架等应急装备陆续抵达居民区出入口。据相关部门和现场人员介绍，当地地震发生于浅层，震感明显，不少住户紧急从楼内撤离，在小区空地、临时安置点或道路两侧逗留，等待消防、医疗与社区工作者开展排查与处置，整体氛围凸显灾情较重和不确定性带来的紧张情绪。
据中国地震台网与地方应急部门近日通报，3 月 20 日前后，四川德阳绵竹市附近监测到一次小尺度地震活动，震级约为 3.4 级，并一度登上社交平台相关话题榜。据当地居民回忆，部分区域有轻微震感，室内吊灯、窗帘出现轻度晃动，个别市民的手机收到预警提示，但城区生产生活秩序总体稳定。绵竹市政府表示，目前暂未接到人员伤亡和重大财产损失报告，后续监测和风险排查工作仍在按程序进行。
据中国地震台网和四川省地震局近日发布的信息显示，绵竹市一带于本周内发生一次 3.4 级左右地震，震中位于当地山地与城镇结合部附近。监测人员称，此次地震震级不高，属常见的小型地震活动，目前暂未发现异常次生灾害迹象。当地政府已启动例行巡查，对部分重点基础设施和地质灾害隐患点开展简要排查，以掌握震后情况，具体技术细节将由专业机构在后续报告中进一步说明。
中国地震台网中心和地方地震台站在德阳绵竹3.4级地震发生后发布了震源信息和基本参数，提供震中位置、震级、发震时间等数据。据地震监测机构在公开信息页面上的版式介绍，此类事件通常会以地图形式标注震中所在方位，并附带周边主要城市、乡镇的距离和烈度分布，便于公众了解震动范围和潜在影响范围。相关部门指出，这些实时监测和预警信息是判断地震是否发生及其大致强度的重要权威来源。
据多家媒体近日发布的应急科普信息报道，针对公众关心的“遇到地震如何应对”问题，有关栏目以图文形式梳理了基础避险要点。报道援引应急和地震领域专业人士建议称，当感到明显震动时，居民应第一时间在室内就地避险，利用桌椅、内承重墙附近等相对安全位置进行短时躲避，并在震后根据现场情况有序撤离到空旷地带。媒体提醒指出，这类提示旨在提高公众对突发地震情形的初步判断能力，引导社会各界在日常生活中加强自我保护意识。

#四川地震##成都震感# 

具体而言是泸定3.8级地震。据中国地震台网正式测定：2026年2月8日14: 06: 45，在四川省甘孜州泸定县（29.52°N，101.97°E）发生3.8级地震，震源深度10千米。

震中位于鲜水河断裂带东南端，也正是2022年9月5日泸定M6.8级地震的破裂区与余应力释放区，很大概率是一次余震——余震 ​​​

【四川甘孜州泸定县发生3.8级地震，网友：“震感明显”】#四川泸定县3.8级地震# 中国地震台网正式测定：2月8日14时06分在四川甘孜州泸定县（北纬29.52度，东经101.97度）发生3.8级地震，震源深度10千米。#四川地震##成都震感#

央视记者从泸定县委宣传部获悉，当地有震感，泸定县应急管理局正在摸排情 ​​​
德阳绵竹3.4级地震发生后，当地住建和社区工作人员在多处住宅小区开展房屋安全排查。据居民和工程技术人员描述，部分楼栋墙体出现细小裂缝，楼道转角和承重墙可能有抹灰层剥落，地面散落砖块、水泥碎片和装饰物残片，反映出震动对建筑表层造成的损伤。尽管多数为轻微破坏，但相关部门仍要求对受影响单元进行进一步结构安全评估，以防隐患扩大，确保居民重新返回居所前具备基本安全条件。
地震发生后，四川省及当地应急管理部门通过多种渠道提醒居民，遇到类似小震或更强地震时，应在室内就近寻找结实桌子、墙角等位置躲避，尽量远离玻璃窗户、吊灯和高大家具，防止被掉落物砸伤。待震动结束后，应听从统一指挥，有序撤离至开阔、安全区域，避免走近高层建筑和高大构筑物，同时注意可能出现的余震。在人员疏散过程中，相关部门特别强调，不要使用电梯逃生，并及时关注权威部门发布的最新信息和风险提示。
据当地社区工作者和消防救援部门介绍，近期小震发生时，城区部分居民反映曾感到短暂晃动，不少人收到手机预警提示，个别小区曾出现居民匆忙下楼聚集的场景。工作人员表示，这类轻度震感在川西地区并不鲜见，一些市民一时紧张属正常反应。随后，社区通过广播、线上群组和张贴告示等方式，向居民转发地震应对知识，提醒遇到类似情况时尽量保持冷静，按照预定疏散路线行动，并注意听从物业和救援力量的统一安排。
在德阳绵竹3.4级地震事件引发关注的同时，当地媒体与应急管理部门也借机传播地震避险和自救科普信息。据相关科普资料介绍，地震发生时，应根据身处环境选择就地躲避或迅速撤离，如在室内应远离窗户和悬挂物，躲在坚固家具旁并保护头部；在人员密集场所则要避免奔跑踩踏，听从现场疏导；震后需迅速切断电源、燃气，携带必要物品有序撤离至开阔地带，减少余震伤害风险。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately reports the core event details (3.4 magnitude, Mianzhu, March 20) but significantly inflates the severity of consequences (casualties, structural damage) compared to the evidence which states no casualties or major losses were reported.
text_analysis.t2_evidence: Post claims 'over ten injured people were sent to hospitals' and 'some buildings and roads remain under temporary control' due to cracking, whereas evidence [2] explicitly states 'no casualties or major property losses reported' and evidence [3] notes 'no abnormal secondary disaster signs', indicating the post's casualty and damage figures are a material overstatement.
t2_problematic_subclaims: Claim of over ten injured patients treated by nightfall
Claim of temporary road closures and building wall cracks causing significant disruption
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is a sensationalized report of a minor earthquake, exaggerating casualty numbers and structural damage that the official evidence confirms were non-existent.

image_analysis.global_notes: The post uses a mix of legitimate news graphics, a genuine photo of damage, and a mismatched image of a different government official to support its narrative.

judge.level3_rationale: 该报道虽然准确描述了3.4级地震的发生，但夸大了造成的伤亡和管控措施，且配图4与地震事件无关，导致图文严重错配，整体可信度较低。
judge.reasoning_trace: 文本夸大后果，图片4严重无关，符合Mostly False标准。
judge.core_claim: 四川德阳绵竹市于3月20日前后发生3.4级地震，导致房屋墙体开裂、部分路段管控、学校停课及医疗救治等影响。
key_subclaims: 地震震级为3.4级，发生于3月20日前后。
多处小区出现墙体开裂，部分路段实施临时管控。
部分学校启动停课及疏散安排。
医院接诊震后受伤市民，截至当晚已有十余名伤者被送医。
图片1展示了绵竹震中位置及受损情况。
图片2展示了地震逃生要点。
图片3展示了绵竹某小区墙体开裂的现场照片。
图片4展示了国务院台湾事务办公室发言人。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 地震震级为3.4级，发生于3月20日前后。
subclaim_findings.note: 中国地震台网通报确认震级约为3.4级，时间吻合。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 多处小区出现墙体开裂，部分路段实施临时管控。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据显示有墙体细小裂缝和排查，但官方通报称暂未接到重大财产损失报告，管控措施多为常规排查。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 部分学校启动停课及疏散安排。
subclaim_findings.note: 证据显示有排查工作，但官方通报称暂未发现异常次生灾害迹象，停课信息可能为个别学校或传言。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 医院接诊震后受伤市民，截至当晚已有十余名伤者被送医。
subclaim_findings.note: 官方通报称暂未接到人员伤亡报告，伤者数量可能夸大或为个别案例。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图片1展示了绵竹震中位置及受损情况。
subclaim_findings.note: 地图样式符合震中定位描述，红底白字角标为常见新闻配图风格。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图片2展示了地震逃生要点。
subclaim_findings.note: 内容符合地震科普常识，与文中提到的媒体科普提示一致。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图片3展示了绵竹某小区墙体开裂的现场照片。
subclaim_findings.note: 照片显示墙体裂缝和地面碎渣，与文中描述一致。

subclaim_findings.subclaim: 图片4展示了国务院台湾事务办公室发言人。
subclaim_findings.note: 图片背景文字显示为'国务院台湾事务办公室'，但地震事件与台办无直接关联，且图片中人物并非台办发言人，属于无关配图。

judge.verdict_reasoning: 文本核心事件（3.4级地震）属实，但对后果（伤亡、停课、管控）的描述存在夸大或未经证实（T2）。图片4与地震事件完全无关，属于严重的图文错配（C1/C2），且图片1、2、3虽为真实素材但被用于支持部分夸大的叙事。多重失真导致整体可信度下降。

image_findings.explanation: 图片为新闻配图，带有红底白字角标和地图定位，符合文中描述的'现场画面'特征，属于视觉编辑（V2）中的新闻海报风格。
图片为科普海报，内容与文中提到的媒体科普提示一致，无编辑痕迹。
图片为现场实拍，显示墙体裂缝，与文中描述一致。
图片背景显示'国务院台湾事务办公室'，与地震事件无关，且人物身份不明，属于图文语义不一致（C1）和语境错置（C2）。
